case_title: LESLIE ECKLES VS. RAPHAEL LOPEZ et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY ECKLES, LESLIE LOPEZ, RAPHAEL LOPEZ, ROCIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECKLES, LESLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, RAPHAEL LOPEZ, ROCIO $1,036.09 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,036.09, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF TO BE 33.33% AT FAULT AND HAD REDUCED AWARD TO HER ACCORDINGLY. NO AWARD IS MADE FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS THEY ARE NOT RECOVERABLE IN A SIMPLE NEGLIGENCE CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
